title: arenaria tetraquetra var. culminicola
intro: Arenaria tetraquetra var. culminicola, also known as Alpine Sandwort, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the carnation family, Caryophyllaceae. Traditionally, Alpine Sandwort has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of this plant are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Alpine Sandwort is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to limited scientific evidence.
